assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended channel for 24 months of support vs 14 months for other channels, with multi-environment approach using Regular for dev and Extended for production

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and explains it blocks minor version upgrades and node pool upgrades while still allowing control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Shows specific gcloud command configuring Sunday 2-6 AM maintenance window with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Provides separate node pool configurations for 'h100-training' and 'system-pool' with explicit explanation that system pool keeps cluster services isolated and upgradeable

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows --enable-autoupgrade=false for H100 pool and includes detailed operational workflow for planned upgrades during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Provides specific YAML configuration with terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 3600 and explains SIGTERM handler for checkpoint saving, plus mentions checkpoint strategy in operational workflow

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands for verifying CUDA version and testing target GKE version in staging, with explicit warning that minor GKE upgrades can change CUDA versions and break training frameworks

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: While it mentions GPUDirect-TCPX support and compact placement for GPUDirect performance, it does not specifically mention strict GKE version requirements or compatibility verification before upgrading
